name: electron-starter
description: Electron + React + TypeScript starter with validated IPC, navigation guard, and crash recovery

scripts.dev:app: wait-on tcp:5173 dist/main/index.cjs dist/preload/index.cjs && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electronmon --trace-warnings dist/main/index.cjs
scripts.watch:main: tsup src/main/index.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node22 --sourcemap --out-dir dist/main --external electron --watch
scripts.watch:preload: tsup src/preload/index.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node22 --sourcemap --out-dir dist/preload --external electron --watch
scripts.build: pnpm clean && pnpm build:renderer && pnpm build:main && pnpm build:preload
scripts.build:main: tsup src/main/index.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node22 --sourcemap --out-dir dist/main --external electron
scripts.build:preload: tsup src/preload/index.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node22 --sourcemap --out-dir dist/preload --external electron
scripts.gate: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.gate:ci: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:ci && pnpm build
